final_prompt.prompt:
Create a screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a streamer.

Style/medium: needs a mobile livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI styling is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format
Subject: must include the streamer (referred to as "神仙姐姐") holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: needs a livestream room setting — exact background details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio, must include Douyin livestream UI elements (comments, likes, viewer count)
Avoid:
